heading: Pretty Printing
body:
By default, extraneous whitespace is stripped from the JSON (Javascript Object Notation) returned
by the server. To ask for pretty-printed JSON (Javascript Object Notation), simply append the
`pretty=true` query parameter to any request:

```shell
curl --header 'Authorization: Bearer {ACCESS-TOKEN}' \
  --header 'Accept: application/json' \
  --include \
  --request GET "https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/v1.0?pretty=true"
```
